improvement_plan.title: Strengthen originality and contribution

improvement_plan.title: Strengthen citation signal
improvement_plan.action:
Add real citations to unsupported factual claims. Use the suggested citations below or find verified sources for each claim. Normalize citation style to APA 7 format without inventing sources.

Real citation suggestions from open research sources:
  • Building and development of an organizational competence for digital transformation in SMEs (2024) — via arXiv
  • A Novel Approach to Analyze Fashion Digital Archive from Humanities (2021) — via arXiv
  • Classifying SMEs for Approaching Cybersecurity Competence and Awareness (2021) — via arXiv
  • Digital Transformation in Microfinance SMEs (2023) — via Crossref

Use these or similar verified citations. Only add citations for claims that genuinely reference these works.
